mapper.sql: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks t WHERE t.goal_id = g.id) AS task_total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasks t WHERE t.goal_id = g.id AND t.completed) AS task_completed, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM goal_stars s WHERE s.goal_id = g.id AND s.user_id = #{userId}) AS starred
id, user_id, title, description, target_date, status, metadata::text AS metadata, share_code, is_public, public_slug, ai_prompt, theme_id, preferences::text AS preferences, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goals ( id, user_id, title, description, target_date, status, metadata, share_code, is_public, public_slug, ai_prompt, theme_id, preferences ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{targetDate}, #{status}, CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), #{shareCode}, #{publicGoal}, #{publicSlug}, #{aiPrompt}, #{themeId}, CAST(#{preferences} AS jsonb) )
mapper.select:
SELECT g.id, g.user_id, g.title, g.description, g.target_date, g.status, g.metadata::text AS metadata, g.share_code, g.is_public, g.public_slug, g.ai_prompt, g.theme_id, g.preferences::text AS preferences, g.created_at, g.updated_at,
FROM goals g WHERE g.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE goals SET share_code = #{shareCode}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT g.id, g.user_id, g.title, g.description, g.target_date, g.status, g.metadata::text AS metadata, g.share_code, g.is_public, g.public_slug, g.ai_prompt, g.theme_id, g.preferences::text AS preferences, g.created_at, g.updated_at,
FROM goals g WHERE g.user_id = #{userId} OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM goal_members m WHERE m.goal_id = g.id AND m.user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY g.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE goals SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, target_date = #{targetDate}, status = #{status}, is_public = #{publicGoal}, ai_prompt = #{aiPrompt}, theme_id = #{themeId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM goals WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
